generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent rise in lone-wolf attacks shows we need to give our law enforcement the tools they need to keep us safe. Some worry about civil liberties, but with proper oversight, these measures will actually protect our communities. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #SafetyFirst #SecureOurFuture
